meaning: n.迦南(<<圣经>>故事中称其为上帝赐给以色列人祖先的"应许之地",是巴勒斯坦,叙利亚和黎巴嫩等地的古称)
examples: Moses admonishes the Israelites not to suppose that their inheritance of the land of Canaan is due to their own powers.
The great civilizations of ancient Egypt, Mesopotamia and the area we refer to as the Fertile Crescent, of which a little part here about the size of Rhode Island is Canaan.
May Canaan be the slave of Shem.
Ms. Clark owned several Manhattan apartments and a 52-acre estate in New Canaan, Connecticut.
Francos Wine Merchants, a family-owned business on Elm Street, the main drag in New Canaan, Conn.
